data.content:
Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: drop
Rationale: The bug no longer exists. State-level ownership from Knots profiles is correctly preserved end-to-end: normalizeStateOwners() extracts profile.owners.states with explicit precedence (knots-backend-workflows.ts:56-76), stateOwners is stored on the MemoryWorkflowDescriptor (line 257), and workflowOwnerKindForState() returns the explicit state-level owner before falling back to step-level (workflows-runtime.ts:190-194). A regression test already covers this (custom-workflow-claimability.test.ts:110-113 asserts stateOwners mapping). The beat was never started (31 days in ready_for_planning) and describes work that is already done.
Agent: claude-claude-sonnet-4-6
Job: stale-grooming-5
Repo: /home/cartine/foolery
Action: marked abandoned.
